name: Twelve Labs
description: Twelve Labs Marengo/Pegasus video understanding APIs for semantic search, summarization and classification of long videos.

seo.title: Twelve Labs — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Twelve Labs: Twelve Labs Marengo/Pegasus video understanding APIs for semantic search, summarization and classification of long videos.

when_to_use: Indexing and searching video content by semantic meaning
Building video understanding features without frame-by-frame logic
Generating video summaries and chapter markers via API
Running multimodal video classification on large content libraries

pros: Semantic search across hours of footage
review.verdict: The go-to API for serious long-form video understanding; few competitors come close on quality.
review.best_for: Media, sports and security teams indexing long video libraries at scale
review.not_for: Short-clip apps where a frame-sampling plus CLIP pipeline is sufficient

developer_experience.reason: Video AI APIs with good docs
